Markwise — 3rd theme (Sepia) + picker

Two warmth levels for the opt-in paper reading mode, each shown in the real layout with all four annotation tints retuned to hold on the warm surface. The ◐ toggle becomes a small named picker (shown open). Dark + Light are unchanged.

Option A  ·  Parchment — lighter warm paper
Markwisesample.md

Overview

Nimbus is a collaborative notebook for teams who live in markdown. It ships by Q3 of next year.

The core promise: write once, review anywhere. The market is large and growing, and the wedge is plain-text specs.

Commentwrite once, review anywhere
Reviewer2h
Tighten to one sentence?
Agent1h
Done — folded into the opener.
Option B  ·  Antique — deeper, more committed warmth
